code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      if first
        result = "#{tok}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{tok}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 2
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
